query:
SELECT (vendida_en AT TIME ZONE $3)::date AS "fecha!",
               COALESCE(SUM(total_centavos), 0)::bigint AS "total!",
               COUNT(*) AS "tickets!"
        FROM ventas.ventas
        WHERE estado = 'confirmada'
          AND (vendida_en AT TIME ZONE $3)::date BETWEEN $1 AND $2
        GROUP BY 1
        ORDER BY 1
